params.name: The Black Book
params.description:
On Jun 29, 2000 BC, the Book of the Dead was completed and buried in the tomb of the Pharaoh.
The Black Book includes ancient transcriptions and scriptures written for the dead, such as incantations, hymns, exorcisms, ceremonial mantras, and names of the gods. The texts are inscribed on the walls of pyramids and tombs. And it's also known as the Guide to the Afterlife. [Scripture Passage] I have not diverted water in its season. I have not erected a dam against flowing water. I have not extin …
